category_sources: Official GitHub README describes diffoci as comparing Docker and OCI container images.
source_facts.description says it is a diff tool for Docker and OCI container images.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use diffoci.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface found for usage, installation, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/reproducible-containers/diffoci, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README references Docker, OCI, and reproducible builds use cases.
source_facts.description identifies container image diff functionality.
